tour.clickHighlighted: Use the highlighted control to continue
tour.targetUnavailable: This area is not visible right now. Continue to the next step.
tour.welcomeTitle: Learn the essentials without the detour
tour.welcomeBody: Try four short chapters. The application practice uses a temporary sample; settings are never saved for you.
tour.openApplicationBody: Click the highlighted card to enter its dossier.
tour.openChecklistBody: Click Checklist to see materials and tasks for this application.
tour.openChecklistComplete: Checklist opened. Finding a practice task…
tour.expandTaskBody: Open the task to reveal its due date, reminder, and notes.
tour.expandTaskComplete: Expanded. The task details stay with this application.
tour.openCorrespondenceBody: Click Correspondence to review outreach and replies in one place.
tour.openCorrespondenceComplete: Correspondence opened. Finding a sample reply…
tour.reviewReplyBody: Each message keeps its sender, date, attachments, and summary in this timeline.
tour.openProfileBody: Keep reusable personal information and writing preferences here.
tour.openProfileComplete: Profile opened. Finding your AI profile…
tour.openAiProfileBody: This profile helps AI match your background and preferred writing style.
tour.profileOverviewTitle: Tell AI how to write for you
tour.profileOverviewBody: Add only what is useful: identity, research interests, goals, and writing tone.
tour.openMailSettingsBody: Open SMTP settings. This guide will not enter or save credentials.
tour.mailOverviewBody: Add the sender, host, port, and app password, then send a test before real mail.
tour.openAiKeyBody: You can connect OpenAI, DeepSeek, Claude, or Gemini.
tour.aiKeyOverviewBody: Choose a provider and model, then paste your API key. Nothing is saved until you submit.
tour.openAiComposerBody: AI lives inside the writing flow, not on a separate page.
tour.openAiComposerAction: Click the highlighted Draft email mode
tour.openAiComposerComplete: Draft editor opened. Finding the AI assistant…
tour.openAiAssistantBody: Draft or reply using only the profile and application context you approve.
tour.openAiAssistantComplete: Assistant opened. You control the context and final send.
tour.finishTitle: Your workspace is ready to explore
tour.finishBody: Configure only what you need. You can replay this guide from Settings at any time.
